languages.original_text: "Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."

languages.text: "Опасно излишне задумываться о сущем, ибо размышления порождают сомнение. А от сомнения до ереси — один шаг".
"Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."
languages.original_text: "Опасно излишне задумываться о сущем, ибо размышления порождают сомнение. А от сомнения до ереси — один шаг".

traits.locale_text: "Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."
"Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."
"Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."

languages.text: «La meditación excesiva sobre la creación es peligrosa, pues da origen a la duda. Y de la duda a la herejía hay solo un paso».
languages.original_text: "Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."

traits.locale_text: «La meditación excesiva sobre la creación es peligrosa, pues da origen a la duda. Y de la duda a la herejía hay solo un paso».

languages.text: 「創造についての過度の熟考は危険です。熟考は疑念を生むのですから。そして疑念から異端までは、わずか一歩にすぎません」
languages.original_text: "Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."

traits.locale_text: 「創造についての過度の熟考は危険です。熟考は疑念を生むのですから。そして疑念から異端までは、わずか一歩にすぎません」

languages.text: “过度沉迷于造物极其危险，因为深思会滋生怀疑。而从怀疑到异端，仅有一步之遥。”
languages.original_text: "Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."

traits.locale_text: “过度沉迷于造物极其危险，因为深思会滋生怀疑。而从怀疑到异端，仅有一步之遥。”

languages.text: "Übertriebene Grübelei über die Schöpfung ist gefährlich, da sie Zweifel sät. Und aus Zweifel wird rasch Ketzerei."
languages.original_text: "Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."

traits.locale_text: "Übertriebene Grübelei über die Schöpfung ist gefährlich, da sie Zweifel sät. Und aus Zweifel wird rasch Ketzerei."

languages.text: « Les ruminations au sujet de la création sont dangereuses, car des ruminations naît le doute, et du doute à l'hérésie, il n'y a qu'un pas. »
languages.original_text: "Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."

traits.locale_text: « Les ruminations au sujet de la création sont dangereuses, car des ruminations naît le doute, et du doute à l'hérésie, il n'y a qu'un pas. »

languages.text: "Yaratılış üzerinde aşırı düşünmek tehlikelidir, zira düşünmek şüphe doğurur. Şüpheden kâfirliğe giden yol, tek bir adımda yürünür."
languages.original_text: "Excessive rumination on creation is dangerous, for rumination gives rise to doubt. And from doubt to heresy there is but a single step."

traits.locale_text: "Yaratılış üzerinde aşırı düşünmek tehlikelidir, zira düşünmek şüphe doğurur. Şüpheden kâfirliğe giden yol, tek bir adımda yürünür."
